parameters.content:
## TMH Auto Blog Publisher

### FLOW:
1. Fetches 5 most recent medium-length videos
2. Filters to full episodes (30+ min)
3. Checks if blog already exists in GitHub
4. If new: fetches transcript
5. Sends to Claude API for blog generation
6. Commits blog post JSON to GitHub
7. Updates posts.json index
8. Cloudflare Pages auto-deploys

### SETUP:
1. Add GitHub PAT credential (Header Auth)
2. Add Anthropic API credential
3. Update credential IDs in nodes
4. Test with manual trigger first

### TRANSCRIPT:
Uses free transcript API.
Falls back to video description if unavailable.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "locationId": "JzYUXEAehZEve2vuOdqM",
  "name": "{{ $('Build Blog JSON').item.json.post.guestName.replace(/^(Dr\.?|Chef|Coach|Pastor|Rev\.?|Professor|Prof\.?)\s+/i, '') }}",
  "firstName": "{{ $('Build Blog JSON').item.json.post.guestName.replace(/^(Dr\.?|Chef|Coach|Pastor|Rev\.?|Professor|Prof\.?)\s+/i, '').split(' ')[0] }}",
  "lastName": "{{ $('Build Blog JSON').item.json.post.guestName.replace(/^(Dr\.?|Chef|Coach|Pastor|Rev\.?|Professor|Prof\.?)\s+/i, '').split(' ').slice(1).join(' ') }}",
  "tags": ["podcast-guest", "guest-outreach-pending"],
  "customFields": [
    {"id": "RyA70UVI5yUY83Wu5hYz", "field_value": "{{ $('Build Blog JSON').item.json.post.title }}"},
    {"id": "zRU07yCeCsSBQrkNZwdb", "field_value": "https://themanageher.com/blog/{{ $('Build Blog JSON').item.json.slug }}"},
    {"id": "lctcR3WExxz0pULDyokA", "field_value": "{{ $('Build Blog JSON').item.json.post.episodeNumber }}"},
    {"id": "HsP54mVLCSvKjPv2sGyO", "field_value": "{{ $('Build Blog JSON').item.json.post.quiz ? $('Build Blog JSON').item.json.post.quiz.title : '' }}"},
    {"id": "KX3Tvi2pvlrUCtlVhYDI", "field_value": "{{ new Date($('Build Blog JSON').item.json.post.publishedAt).toLocaleDateString('en-CA', { timeZone: 'America/Los_Angeles' }) }}"}
  ]
}
